caption: A man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a grey blazer over a white shirt, stands on a stage next to a large presentation screen. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands. The screen displays the title "TODAY: INDUSTRY-READY ML" followed by a list of topics: "Overview & caveats in scaling data pipelines", "Airflow components (Celery, ML models, etc)", "Introducing difference between ML & Data Pipelines", "Overview of Airflow + Usecase", and "THE BIG PICTURE". A decorative geometric pattern appears behind the text. At the bottom of the scene, a white banner features the "europython" logo and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". Throughout the sequence, the man continues to speak and shift his posture while the presentation slide remains static. The lighting is dim, with the primary light sources being the presentation screen and stage spotlights.
